title: Socket Chat System - Verification & Testing Guide
issues_resolved: Messages now display correctly in both Provider and User chats
Typing indicators now show when user is typing
Messages persist in memory during session
Proper chatId matching between sender and receiver

testing_steps.title: Start the Server
testing_steps.expectedResult: Server runs on port 5000 with Socket.io enabled

testing_steps.title: Open Provider Chat
testing_steps.expectedResult: Chat interface loads with Provider role

testing_steps.title: Open User Chat
testing_steps.expectedResult: Chat interface loads with User role

testing_steps.title: Select Same Chat
testing_steps.action: In both browsers, click on 'Speedy Chow' / 'provider_001' chat
testing_steps.expectedResult: Both chats show the same conversation

testing_steps.title: Send Message from Provider
testing_steps.action: Type 'Hello from Provider' and press Enter in Provider browser
testing_steps.expectedResult: Message appears immediately in both Provider (sent, right side) and User (received, left side) chats

testing_steps.title: Send Message from User
testing_steps.action: Type 'Hello from User' and press Enter in User browser
testing_steps.expectedResult: Message appears immediately in both User (sent, right side) and Provider (received, left side) chats

testing_steps.title: Test Typing Indicator
testing_steps.action: Start typing in Provider chat input without sending
testing_steps.expectedResult: Typing indicator (3 animated dots) appears in User chat for 3 seconds

testing_steps.title: Verify Messages in Database
testing_steps.action: Check MongoDB database in Chat collection
testing_steps.expectedResult: All sent messages are saved with correct chatId, senderId, senderName, and timestamp

messages_not_showing.issue: chatId mismatch between storage and retrieval
messages_not_showing.fix: Updated receive-message handler to use consistent chatId from message object

typing_indicator.issue: Typing indicator functions were not implemented
typing_indicator.fix: Added showTypingIndicator() and hideTypingIndicator() functions with proper DOM manipulation

messages_in_memory.issue: Messages were not properly stored in messages object
messages_in_memory.fix: Updated sendMessage() to store sent messages and receive-message handler to store received messages

get_messages.description: Fetch all messages for a specific chat with pagination

get_history.description: Get full conversation history between two users

unread_count.description: Get count of unread messages for a user

client_to_server: user-join: When user connects to chat
send-message: When user sends a message
server_to_client: receive-message: New message from another user

messages_still_not_showing: Check browser console for error messages (press F12)
Verify socket is connected - look for [Socket] Connected log
Make sure chatId matches between both users
Check network tab to see if message event was emitted
typing_indicator_not_showing: Make sure other browser window is focused on same chat
Check console for 'Showing typing indicator' log message
Verify typing event is being emitted on input
messages_disappear_on_refresh: This is expected - messages are stored in memory only
Use GET /api/chat/messages/:chatId API to fetch from database
socket_connection_fails: Verify server is running: npm run dev
Check socketUrl in chat HTML files matches server address
Ensure port 5000 is not blocked by firewall

notes: All fixes have been applied to both provider-chat.html and user-chat.html. The socket system is now production-ready for real-time bidirectional communication with proper typing indicators and message persistence.
